MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Cabus (415-629-0416) for Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is discussed. The Defendant did not inform the other side or the Court that he was contesting the matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MARK CABUS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. The demurrer is ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure 430.41. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/rbu)
